name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement

labels: enhancement

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What limitation, friction, or missing capability does this address?
Be specific: which Telegram Web client, which message type, which language pair, what fails. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature. Be precise about what it should do, not how it should be implemented. -->

## Architecture fit

<!-- How does this fit the existing module structure?
Which src/ files would be affected?
Does this require a new module registered on window._twtp?
Does it introduce new DATA_ATTR constants? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why are they inferior? -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Specific, testable conditions for this feature to be done. -->

## Additional context
